items.raw_desc: Izzadásgátló DRICLOR Antiperspirant Roll-On 20 ml:A DRICLOR Roll-On izzadásgátló hatékony megoldást kínál a túlzott izzadás ellen. Az alumínium-klorid tartalmának köszönhetően csökkenti az izzadást, ezáltal megelőzi a kellemetlen testszag kialakulását. items.raw_desc: Kanál Made in Japan kanál Matt 15 cm:        Made In Japan is an Australian brand that imports Japanese ceramics from the Mino area, where the soil is rich in many of the ingredients needed for production. Ceramics is therefore aptly called Minoyaki. This Made in Japan Matt spoon in black also comes from this workshop. Minoyaki is appreciated for being handmade and hiding centuries-old traditions that inspire local artists. Each piece of dishes is original and its colours are permanent and do not peel off. The design of the spoon is simple, which highlights the material and its quality. It does not contain any metals or other harmful substances. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave.
